---
output: html_document
pagetitle: Josh Leon - About Me
---
<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>

<style>
div.grey { text-align:center; background-color:#333333; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "grey">

# [Home](http://JLEON123.github.io) | [About Me](https://JLEON123.github.io/aboutme) | [Portfolio](http://JLEON123.github.io/portfolio/) | [CV](https://JLEON123.github.io/aboutme/Josh_Leon_CV.pdf)

</div>

<br>

<style>
div.brownone { color:#ffffff; text-align:center; background-color:#a89d82; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "brownone">
# Josh Leon

___

</div>

<style>
div.brown { color:#ffffff; text-align:left; background-color:#a89d82; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "brown">

### I am an undergraduate student 

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
